creator: zeising@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Niclas Zeising from comment #69)

The same version is also available in our development repo, here:\https://github.com/FreeBSDDesktop/freebsd-ports/tree/feature/input-ports

Remember, if you apply the patch using patch(1), you need to specify -E to have it remove empty files.  Using svn patch, if you are in a svn repo, does the right thing.
